message:
chore(deps): Update portable-pty from 0.8.1 to 0.9.0

Dependency Version Bump:
- ftui-demo-showcase: portable-pty 0.8.1 → 0.9.0 (dev-dependencies)
- ftui-harness: portable-pty 0.8.1 → 0.9.0 (optional dependency)
- ftui-pty: portable-pty 0.8.1 → 0.9.0 (dependencies)

portable-pty is used for PTY-based testing infrastructure, enabling
end-to-end tests that spawn actual terminal sessions for realistic
rendering verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
